steps.t: The Folde Farm can be found just north of Aldburg. Éothain has asked you to travel to the Folde Farm and warn them of the potential of Orc-attacks.
Witgil is somewhere at the Folde Farm. Now that you have arrived at the Folde Farm, you should seek out and speak with Witgil.
Éothain is near the entrance of Aldburg to the south of Folde Farm. You have alerted the people at the Folde Farm about the Orc-threat and should now …
